name: chain_you_said_you_would_start_with_0and_
method:
"you said you would start with $0"

and i did

- i sent 500+ dms to different accounts offering to buy ($0 spent)

- i found the best one and negotiated the price down ($0 spent)

- i'm paying $500 ac

stages.task: Scan platforms for accounts 1K-50K followers with low post frequency, no link-in-bio monetization, niche alignment with our verticals (faith, fitness, tech)
Score by engagement_rate * follower_count * niche_rpm. Filter to top 20%. Flag accounts where BNPL monthly < projected monthly revenue
Generate personalized DM: compliment specific post + offer. Rate limit 50 DMs/day. Track sent/opened/replied/negotiating
Calculate BNPL terms across Klarna/Afterpay/Affirm. Generate counter-offers anchored at 60% of asking. Ensure monthly payment < projected account revenue
Route acquired accounts to content_factory for immediate posting. Wire affiliate links. Track first 30-day revenue vs BNPL obligation
